details: The agent successfully navigated to https://httpbin.org/html using pinchtab, retrieved the page structure via snap, and correctly identified the first sentence of the text content: 'Availing himself of the mild, summer-cool weather...' This matches the actual page content visible in the agent trajectory output (node e4). The agent correctly identified the page as a Herman Melville Moby-Dick excerpt and reported the complete first sentence accurately.
